title: Procurement Assistant [Jurong East | 5 days | up to $3000] - LCYL
description:
Procurement Assistant 

5 days, 8.30am- 6pm

Salary: $2,500 - $3,000

Location: Penjuru Lane, Singapore 609189 (Jurong East)

Job Description:

  • Responsible for full spectrum of purchasing process (sourcing, quotation enquiry, price negotiation, placement of orders and delivery arrangement).
  • Data Entry of Purchase Orders (PO).
  • Maintain accurate records of procurement activities, including contracts, purchase orders, and supplier performance.
  • Ensure proper documentation and filing as per ISO guidelines.
  • Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, negotiate prices and terms of contracts, and monitor supplier performance.
  • Sourcing suppliers and purchase electrical equipment, spare parts, and other electronic components.
  • Ensure timely delivery of materials and services.
  • Manage inventory levels to ensure adequate supply without excessive stockpiling and conduct stock take.
  • Identify and implement opportunities for cost savings and process improvement in the procurement function.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment between procurement activities and overall project goals.
  • Any ad-hoc duties assigned by the supervisor.

Job requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
  • At least 2 years of relevant experience.
  • Strong understanding of procurement processes and practices, including sourcing, negotiation, and contract management.
  • Possess electrical knowledge, experience in dealing with freight forwarders and coming from marine & offshore industry will be an added advantage.


Cheong Yeat Long | R25145358

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279
